heading: Tonight
text: Partial clearing in the early then more clouds build after midnight with scattered snow showers over the central Greens. Cold. Lows in the 20s, a few upper teens over the higher terrain north. Winds becoming northwest 10 to 15 mph, diminishing to light by morning.

heading: Tuesday
text: Morning clouds and localized snow showers. A dusting to an inch, mainly over the higher terrain. Breaks of sun developing west to east in the afternoon. Cold. Highs from 30 to 40 north to south. Northwest winds near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Becoming mostly clear and frigid. Lows in the teens to low 20s, near 10 in the colder mountain valleys. Winds diminishing to light and variable.
